caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering, and a gold watch is seated in a studio setting. He is speaking into a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo that reads "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically next to five gold stars. A blue sign on the wall behind him states "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". On the table in front of him are several items, including a black case, a small round container with a red and white label that says "TALK OUT", and a small circular logo. As the scene progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, moving it from his side to an open-palm position in front of him to emphasize his speech, while his head turns slightly as he continues talking.
